# komodo_alerter (Data Source)

Reads an existing Komodo alerter resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "komodo_alerter" "example" {
  id = "6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The alerter identifier (ObjectId or name).

### Read-Only

- `alert_types` (List of String) Alert types the alerter is configured to send. Empty means all types.
- `custom_endpoint` (Attributes) Configuration for a Custom HTTP endpoint alerter. Populated when `endpoint_type` is `Custom`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--custom_endpoint))
- `discord_endpoint` (Attributes) Configuration for a Discord alerter. Populated when `endpoint_type` is `Discord`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--discord_endpoint))
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the alerter is enabled.
- `endpoint_type` (String) The alerter endpoint type: `Custom`, `Slack`, `Discord`, `Ntfy`, or `Pushover`.
- `name` (String) The unique name of the alerter.
- `ntfy_endpoint` (Attributes) Configuration for a Ntfy alerter. Populated when `endpoint_type` is `Ntfy`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ntfy_endpoint))
- `pushover_endpoint` (Attributes) Configuration for a Pushover alerter. Populated when `endpoint_type` is `Pushover`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pushover_endpoint))
- `slack_endpoint` (Attributes) Configuration for a Slack alerter. Populated when `endpoint_type` is `Slack`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--slack_endpoint))

<a id="nestedatt--custom_endpoint"></a>
### Nested Schema for `custom_endpoint`

Read-Only:

- `url` (String) The HTTP/S endpoint URL.


<a id="nestedatt--discord_endpoint"></a>
### Nested Schema for `discord_endpoint`

Read-Only:

- `url` (String) The Discord webhook URL.


<a id="nestedatt--ntfy_endpoint"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ntfy_endpoint`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) Optional email address for Ntfy email notifications.
- `url` (String) The Ntfy topic URL.


<a id="nestedatt--pushover_endpoint"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pushover_endpoint`

Read-Only:

- `url` (String) The Pushover URL including application and user tokens.


<a id="nestedatt--slack_endpoint"></a>
### Nested Schema for `slack_endpoint`

Read-Only:

- `url` (String) The Slack app webhook URL.
